BTC.reasoning: Flat decision holds: dominant SMA signal (-0.85) outweighs mixed votes. Extreme Fear weighed as conflict (crowded longs + positive funding/taker ~1 suggest momentum continuation rather than clean contrarian bounce). No major fragility requiring veto or conviction drop.

ETH.reasoning: Setup flat coerente: trend fortemente negativo (dist SMA -16%, rel BTC -5.8%) domina ma Extreme Fear (12) offre segnale contrarian. F&G pesato come conflict perché long/short alto (2.54) e OI stabile indicano longs ancora affollati, non capitolazione. Conviction bassa già corretta, nessun veto.

VELVET.reasoning: Setup fragile: RSI 90.6 + 618% 7d pump + 398% above SMA signal reversal risk despite positive momentum and taker flow. Extreme Fear (12) weighted as conflict, not clean contrarian, because derivatives show fading OI and already parabolic price action. Long lacks coherence.

BEAT.reasoning: Setup fragile: long su RSI 96.3 dopo +532% 7d e dist_SMA +409% è incoerente nonostante Extreme Fear. OI in forte calo e long_short basso non supportano continuation. F&G pesato come conflict (paura vs momentum estremo). Veto applicato.

STG.reasoning: Setup fragile: +109% 7d, RSI 77.4 and +118% above SMA clash with long signal despite crowded shorts and OI rise. Extreme Fear weighed as contrarian buy but conflicts with overbought momentum and negative funding, producing mixed derivatives read.

ALLO.reasoning: Extreme Fear (12) supports contrarian long after 121% 7d run-up. However OI dropped 11.7% and taker ratio <1 signal fading momentum, weakening the setup. No veto but conviction reduced by 1 for this conflict between sentiment and derivatives.

H.reasoning: Setup short coerente con momentum estremo e taker sell, ma Extreme Fear (F&G=12) genera conflitto: i derivati mostrano funding negativo e OI in calo che rafforzano il momentum ribassista, mentre long/short >2 indica posizionamento long affollato. Peso Fear come fattore di fragilità che riduce conviction di 1 senza veto.
